typography.strategy: Clean, stable, extremely readable at small sizes (mobile-first).

layout_and_spacing.grid: grid-cols-2 for folders, grid-cols-3 for items
layout_and_spacing.spacing: Dense padding to fit more items. p-2 to p-4 maximum.
layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-gray-50 pb-20 (mobile web app styling)
layout_and_spacing.rules: Mobile-first width, use max-w-md for centering on desktop to simulate mobile.

components.search_bar: Always visible sticky header. Input with left search icon. Height h-10, rounded-xl, bg-white border border-gray-200. No lag -> debounce on code side.
components.toggle: Pill-shaped toggle switch (bg-gray-100, rounded-full, p-1) with active state (bg-white, shadow-sm).
components.quick_filters: Horizontal scrollable flex-row (overflow-x-auto, hide-scrollbar). Pill badges (rounded-full, border border-gray-200 bg-white, text-xs px-3 py-1.5).
components.folder_card: Aspect-square. Relative layout. Stacked effect (simulate folders with overlapping divs behind). Image cover rounded-xl. Label below.
components.item_card: Aspect-[2/3] for cards/comics, aspect-square for funko. Use object-cover. 1px border border-gray-200 rounded-lg. Reduced size (20-30% smaller).
components.status_badge: Absolute top-1 right-1. text-[9px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full uppercase tracking-wider font-bold. Green=VENDITA, Blue=SCAMBIO.
components.animations: Strict constraint: max 200ms duration. transition-all duration-150 ease-out. No floating or bounciness. Only scale down on tap (active:scale-95).

image_urls.description: Stack of pokemon cards for item preview

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first screen. The root container MUST be `max-w-md mx-auto` to emulate a mobile app view on desktop.
Implement the 'Le Mie Collezioni' header with a pill-shaped Segmented Control for the 'Categoria / Serie' toggle.
Place the search bar and filter pills under the header. They should be sticky (`sticky top-0 z-10 bg-gray-50/90 backdrop-blur-md`).
Create a 'Folders' view (grid-cols-2) and an 'Items' view (grid-cols-3) when a folder is tapped.
Items grid should have dense spacing (gap-2). Cards should be reduced by ~20-30% via smaller padding and text scales.
Add 'VENDITA' (Green) or 'SCAMBIO' (Blue) badges absolute positioned at top-right of items.
Use strict interaction rules: all animations must be max 200ms (`duration-150` or `duration-200`). Use `active:scale-95` for tap feedback. NO spring or bounce.
Optimize for thumb-zone: ensure filters can be horizontally scrolled easily and items are clearly tap targets without excessive padding.
Include `data-testid` attributes on all interactive elements (search input, tabs, filter pills, folders, item cards).
